problem id: bb056bc9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  11111101 -> 11111111
  00100100 -> 01001111
  00100001 -> 01111010
  01010011 -> 00111101
  10011111 -> 01111111
  10111111 -> 11111111
  01100111 -> 01011001
  00011100 -> 01101111

query: 01000110
predicted answer: 11010101
